maintext: Ilya Zhitomirskiy was a software developer and co-founder of Diaspora, a decentralized social networking platform created as a privacy-aware alternative to Facebook. While a student at New York University, Zhitomirskiy and three classmates launched a successful Kickstarter campaign in 2010 to fund development of the open source social network. The project drew widespread attention as a response to growing concerns about privacy on centralized social media platforms.
